track.title: LLM Evaluation & Observability
track.description: Minimal catalog for LLMOps — metrics, judges, regression, and online evals.

nodes.title: Eval metrics
outcomes: Pick metrics that match the product risk
Separate automatic vs human-rated scores
Avoid vanity metrics that ignore failure cost
rubric: Names metrics for a given task type

nodes.title: LLM-as-judge
outcomes: Write a judge rubric with clear criteria
Calibrate judge scores against human labels
Detect judge bias and position effects
rubric: Names a known judge failure mode

nodes.title: Eval datasets
outcomes: Build a versioned golden dataset
Cover edge cases and safety slices
Track dataset provenance and labels

nodes.title: Regression gates
outcomes: Run offline evals in CI on every change
Set pass/fail thresholds with owners
Bisect regressions to prompt or model changes

nodes.title: Tracing & spans
outcomes: Instrument LLM calls with traces
Attach inputs/outputs for debugging
Filter traces by error and latency
rubric: Explains what belongs in a span
Shows how to debug from a trace

nodes.title: Online evaluation
outcomes: Sample live traffic for offline review
Collect user feedback signals safely
Compare online vs offline metric drift

nodes.title: LLMOps loop
outcomes: Turn eval failures into backlog items
Schedule model/prompt refresh cadences
Report eval health to stakeholders
rubric: Links a failure to a backlog item
